raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX and XXXX, fraudulent charges of {$280.00} each were made on my Barclay 's card from a local XXXX XXXX. I reported this to XXXX XXXX and disputed the charges on my Barclays card, closed my Barclays account, and filed a police report. Barclays closed the case due to 'insufficient proof of cancellation, ' which is nonsensical, as no proof of cancellation would exist because neither transaction was made by me. I was not in the store on either day, neither did I make any online purchases.
